system_boundary.name: arq
system_boundary.description: Python asyncio job queue library backed by Redis for distributed background task execution.

containers.name: Worker Process
containers.description: Long-running asyncio event loop that polls Redis for due jobs, executes registered async coroutines, and writes results back to Redis.

containers.name: Application / Client
containers.description: Caller process that imports ArqRedis to enqueue jobs and optionally await results. Not shipped as a standalone binary — embedded in the consumer's application.

external_systems.name: Redis
external_systems.description: Primary data store; holds job queues (sorted sets), in-progress markers, and job results with TTL.

relationships.description: Enqueues jobs by writing serialised JobDef to Redis sorted set; reads JobResult from result key.
Polls Redis sorted sets for due jobs, claims them atomically via WATCH/MULTI, executes functions, writes results.

people_container_mappings.description: Developer embeds ArqRedis in application code to enqueue jobs.
Operator invokes the arq CLI to start and manage worker processes.
